items.question: Anthropic was founded in approximately which year?
Constitutional AI is historically important because it:
options: Eliminated all need for human oversight
Introduced principle-guided training influential to Claude's development
items.answer: Introduced principle-guided training influential to Claude's development
items.explanation: Constitutional AI is a signature Anthropic research direction shaping training philosophy.

items.question: Claude reached a broader audience in the 2022–2023 window primarily through:
options: Only offline desktop binaries with no network
API access for developers and the claude.ai chat interface
items.answer: API access for developers and the claude.ai chat interface
items.explanation: Developers integrated via API; consumers adopted via claude.ai—parallel expansion paths.

items.question: Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku naming primarily communicates:
options: Model tiers trading off capability, speed, and cost
items.answer: Model tiers trading off capability, speed, and cost
items.explanation: Tier names help users and developers pick an appropriate model band—exact generations evolve over time.
